tasks.title: Add readiness reads (Q1–Q3) to the reference repositories
tasks.dod: Repository methods return full-set readiness, scene-scoped readiness and reference-less scenes per data-model Q1–Q3; integration tests cover manual-no-flow, running-no-output, done-with-output and deleted-output block states against live MySQL.

tasks.title: Add ReferenceNotReadyError replacing StarGateFailedError in the error module
tasks.dod: ReferenceNotReadyError maps to 422 with codes references.reference_gate_failed / references.unlinked_scenes and details { blocks, scenes } through the central handler; unit tests assert the wire shape from contracts/openapi.yaml.

tasks.title: Replace the full-draft star gate with the Reference-done gate in the illustration service
tasks.dod: Full-draft start passes only when every reference block is ready and (with ≥1 block) every scene is linked; zero-block drafts pass; rejection names blocking blocks or unlinked scenes; owner-scoped resolve precedes gate evaluation; service unit tests cover all branches.

tasks.title: Scope the per-scene regeneration gate to the blocks linked to that scene
tasks.dod: Per-scene start checks only blocks linked to the scene (data-model Q2): unlinked not-ready blocks never block, zero linked blocks pass, and the rejection names only the scene's blocking blocks — verified by service unit tests.

tasks.title: Remove the principal image from the scene-generation app path
tasks.dod: Scene start no longer calls ensureReadyReference/createReferenceJob, the status read no longer calls getLatestReference, and the wire type drops the reference object plus the two principal automation phases; a seeded legacy principal row changes nothing on the scene path (unit-tested).

tasks.title: Delete the four principal-image routes and update the API contract package
tasks.dod: The four principal-image routes and their controller handlers are deleted (Express answers 404), packages/api-contracts openapi.ts reflects the revised status schema and 422 gate branches in the same commit, and contract path tests pass.

tasks.title: Select exactly one reference output per linked block in the worker selection module
tasks.dod: selectSceneReferences returns one output per linked block — primary star if completed-usable, else latest completed (created_at DESC, file_id DESC tie-break) — and the scoped star-gate rudiment checks output-existence instead of stars; unit tests cover star-usable, star-deleted-fallback and no-star cases.

tasks.title: Drop the principal-image read from the scene job inputs
tasks.dod: resolveSceneInputs no longer reads the principal referenceOutputFileId; zero-reference drafts generate from prompt + derived style; only the selected outputs of blocks linked to the scene are passed to generation — verified by job unit tests.

tasks.title: Remove the principal-image step and components from the storyboard SPA
tasks.dod: PrincipalImageApprovalModal/Preview/Lightbox/ApprovalControls and their hook/api/type usages are deleted, the generation flow proceeds without any principal step, and no client code calls the removed endpoints; existing component tests updated and green.

tasks.title: Render the Reference-done gate rejection with named blocks and unlinked scenes
tasks.dod: A 422 with references.reference_gate_failed lists the named blocking blocks with finish/retry/remove guidance (existing reference-flow controls), and references.unlinked_scenes lists the named scenes with link-a-reference guidance — built from existing shared components and co-located *.styles.ts; component tests cover both branches.

tasks.title: Add API integration tests for the gate against live MySQL
tasks.dod: Endpoint-level integration tests cover every gate AC including the seeded legacy-principal ignore-on-read case and a non-owner 404 without state disclosure, plus an assertion that the gate path performs no provider call (spec §6 gate-evaluation cost); seed helpers follow data-model §Test fixtures.

tasks.title: Add worker tests for the reference boundary invariant and selection
tasks.dod: Worker integration tests assert the invariant (an unlinked block's output is never read for a scene — spec §6: 0 scenes fed an unlinked output), the selection rule including the deleted-star fallback, the zero-reference path, and that a legacy principal row is never consumed.

tasks.title: Add a Playwright e2e flow for the gate through the UI
tasks.dod: An e2e spec drives a draft with a not-ready reference to a blocked start showing the named block, then to a successful start after the reference completes, with no principal-image step anywhere in the flow.

tasks.title: Document the adopted defaults and close the spec open questions
tasks.dod: Spec §8 OQ-2 (no reaper — out of scope) and OQ-3 (one-shot start check) are checked off as resolved-by-default with the known limitation documented, and the feature docs note that the deferred DROP stays in migrations/_deferred/ pending the KPI window.
